'''Andinri''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Carida system/Legends|Carida system]],<ref name="Carida" /> a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="Atlas" /> Andinri was the sixth and farthest [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the system from the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Caridan]], and Andinri was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by twenty [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="Carida" />

==Behind the scenes==
Andinri was first mentioned in [[Carida: Heavy Duty|''Carida: Heavy Duty, Part 1: Weight Training'']], the first in the ''[[Carida: Heavy Duty]]'' series of web articles released on [[Wizards.com]] that detailed the planet [[Carida/Legends|Carida]]. The article was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published on [[September 4]], [[2003]].<ref name="Carida" />
